title: drummondita hassellii
intro: Drummondita hassellii is a plant species found in the Andes mountains, specifically in Ecuador and Colombia, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of Drummondita hassellii lie in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and its anti-inflammatory properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering several health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Drummondita hassellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used to treat its various health applications.
